# Sanjeev Singh — Software Development Engineer

> Portfolio of Sanjeev Singh, a full-stack software engineer based in Bhopal, India.
> He builds web and mobile products end to end: Next.js/React frontends, Flutter apps,
> Node.js and Python backends, AWS serverless architectures, and ML/computer-vision pipelines.

## About

- Current role: Software Development Engineer II at AlignTogether Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (Oct 2024 - present)
- Previously: SDE Intern at Affirmity Corp (Dec 2023 - Sep 2024)
- Education: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, Sagar Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal (2020-2024)

## Selected projects

- MyPassword (https://mypassword.sanjeevnode.in): zero-knowledge password vault; AES-256-GCM envelope encryption, Argon2id, Next.js 15, Firebase
- BlogGen (https://blog.sanjeevnode.in): full-stack blogging platform on Next.js and Firestore
- Win Rewrite (https://github.com/sanjeevnode/win_rewrite_app): cross-platform hotkey text rewriter powered by the Gemini API
- Trimly (https://trimly.sanjeevnode.in): URL shortener built with Next.js and MongoDB
